About Katasi Physiotherapy

Helping people reclaim their mobility and live pain-free lives through evidence-based care.

Our Story

Katasi Physiotherapy was founded to help people reclaim their mobility and live pain-free lives through evidence-based care and personalized treatment plans.

Our Philosophy

  • Movement is medicine — We believe in the healing power of targeted movement and exercise.
  • Patient education — We empower you to understand your body and prevent future injury.
  • Long-term healing — We focus on sustainable recovery, not just quick fixes.

Credentials

Our physiotherapist is qualified and trained at:

  • KMTC (Kenya Medical Training College)
  • Amref University

Ready to start your recovery journey?

Call Now WhatsApp
Katasi Physiotherapy

Move without pain. Recover stronger.
